ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "url_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the location URL */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Neighborhood of the location */,
  "rating_score" REAL /* Average rating score of the location */,
  "rating_number" INTEGER /* Number of ratings received */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the location */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the location */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image representing the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("url_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the amenity */,
  "url_id" TEXT /* Reference to the location's URL */,
  "amenity_description" TEXT /* Description of the amenity offered at the location */,
  "amenity_type" TEXT /* Type of amenity (e.g., electrical, furniture) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the amenity available */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the amenity record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the amenity record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amenities_url_id FOREIGN KEY ("url_id") REFERENCES locations ("url_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addons" (
  "addon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the addon */,
  "url_id" TEXT /* Reference to the location's URL */,
  "addon_description" TEXT /* Description of the addon */,
  "addon_price" REAL /* Price for the addon */,
  "addon_type" TEXT /* Type of addon (e.g., equipment, service) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the addon available */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the addon */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the addon record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the addon record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("addon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addons_url_id FOREIGN KEY ("url_id") REFERENCES locations ("url_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "space_capacity" (
  "capacity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the capacity record */,
  "url_id" TEXT /* Reference to the location's URL */,
  "capacity_type" TEXT /* Type of capacity (e.g., maximum seating, lounge space) */,
  "capacity_value" INTEGER /* Numeric value representing the capacity */,
  "capacity_description" TEXT /* Description of the capacity type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the capacity record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the capacity record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("capacity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_space_capacity_url_id FOREIGN KEY ("url_id") REFERENCES locations ("url_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opening_hours" (
  "hours_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the opening hours record */,
  "url_id" TEXT /* Reference to the location's URL */,
  "day" TEXT /* Day of the week the hours apply to */,
  "opening_time" TEXT /* Opening time for the location */,
  "closing_time" TEXT /* Closing time for the location */,
  "holiday_hours" TEXT /* Special hours for holidays */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the opening hours record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the opening hours record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hours_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opening_hours_url_id FOREIGN KEY ("url_id") REFERENCES locations ("url_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "url_id" TEXT /* Reference to the location's URL */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event suitable for the location */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., meeting, workshop) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_url_id FOREIGN KEY ("url_id") REFERENCES locations ("url_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing" (
  "pricing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the pricing record */,
  "url_id" TEXT /* Reference to the location's URL */,
  "price_type" TEXT /* Type of pricing (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  "price_value" REAL /* Price for the booking option */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the price is denominated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the pricing option */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pricing record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pricing record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pricing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_url_id FOREIGN KEY ("url_id") REFERENCES locations ("url_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., member, guest, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the booking */,
  "url_id" TEXT /* Reference to the location's URL */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date of the booking */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the booking */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the booking */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., confirmed, pending, canceled) */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount charged for the booking */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of payment (e.g., paid, unpaid) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the booking was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the booking was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_url_id FOREIGN KEY ("url_id") REFERENCES locations ("url_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
